title: WAGNER Cordless Paint Sprayer Control Pro 300 Move 18V Kit - Free and Flexible: as a Convenient Backpack, situated on The Ground or Carried with The Handle *incl. Battery and Charger*
features: For water-based and solvent-based materials such as emulsion and latex paints for interior use, lacquers and varnishes, wood preservatives, stains, oils, etc.
Smart design with adjustable and removable carrying straps: spraying in backpack, side-carrying or stationary position for complete freedom
Wide range of indoor and outdoor applications, for medium to large projects and frequent use
Bosch Professional 18V AMPShare battery system. (Battery and charger are INCLUDED in the scope of delivery)

Lightweight airless gun with low trigger force, swivel joint and integrated filter for comfortable spraying. Innovative tip technology - soft-flowing spray jet improves control for a more even finish.
description: From the manufacturer Universal Airless Sprayer Control Pro 300 Move 18V Move. Spray. Your way. High mobility and flexible application areas thanks to Bosch Professional 18V AMPShare. What is the AMPShare Alliance from BOSCH The WAGNER battery from the BOSCH Professional series AMPShare is the cross-brand battery platform from BOSCH Professional that allows professionals to switch flexibly between tools from different brands. You save time, money, space and effort in your work, as batteries and chargers from different manufacturers are a thing of the past. The 18V lithium-ion battery is compact and lightweight, making it a reliable partner for your construction sites. Matching accessories Tip 311 tip for lacquers and varnishes 515 tip for wall paint Filter Set T2 Gun Filter Set red Filter Set white Filter Set yellow What are the advantages of the Control Pro units? Up to 55% less overspray Thanks to the lower pressure, up to 55% less overspray is generated compared to conventional airless technology. This makes airless spraying systems with HEA technology particularly attractive for indoor use, as the amount of masking required is significantly reduced, saving a lot of time. Reduced overspray also means material savings as less paint is wasted due to atomisation. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. Maximum control and ease of use Uncontrolled spraying and application errors are a thing of the past. The reduced pressure of the Control Pro Airless devices results in less recoil and a lower speed of the material particles — so you maintain maximum control while spraying. The ergonomic handle and light trigger of the high-quality HEA Airless gun means effortless and comfortable working. Maximum control thanks to reduced particle speed and the transport of larger particles ensures easy handling and professional results. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Perfect coverage The new design of the High Efficiency Airless nozzle allows a softer spray jet, so you always get streak-free results with perfect coverage when working with emulsion or varnish. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Longer service life Compared to conventional airless devices, High Efficiency Airless reduces the spraying pressure by around 50% with the same material flow rate. This has a further positive effect: the pump and its components are less stressed, resulting in reduced wear and therefore a longer service life for Control Pro devices. Airless - Product comparison Control 150 M Control Pro 250 M Control Pro 300 Move 18V Processible material Wall paints, lacquers & varnishes, wood and corrosion protection Processible material Wall paints, lacquers & varnishes, wood and corrosion protection Processible material Wall paints, lacquers & varnishes, wood and corrosion protection Delivery volume 0,9 l/min Delivery volume 1,25 l/min Delivery volume 0,9 l/min Container volume 5500 ml Container volume Direct suction from the paint bucket Container volume 4700 ml Hose length 7,5 m Hose length 9 m Hose length 7,6 m Battery operated No Battery operated No Battery operated Yes Do I need to dilute the paint when spraying with an airless paint sprayer? With the Control 150 M and the Control Pro series, it's possible to spray interior wall paints, wood and metal paints either undiluted or slightly diluted. For detailed information, please refer to the paint manufacturer’s technical data sheet. Which battery is the right one for the Control Pro 300 Move 18V? All batteries from the BOSCH AMPShare Alliance (GBA 18V 2.0Ah/3.0Ah/4.0Ah/5.0Ah and 6.0Ah and ProCore 18V 4.0Ah/5.5Ah/8.0Ah/12.0Ah and +8Ah) are compatible with the WAGNER Control Pro 300 Move 18V. Why do I have an additional filter set with the Control Pro paint sprayers? Lower quality paints often contain larger particles or impurities. Dirt or dried paint from the outside can also cause the nozzle to become blocked. The blocking of the nozzle can be minimised by using the HEA filter set. Are there any tips and tricks for achieving a perfect spray finish? We recommend spraying in a vertical spray direction. Move the device at a constant distance of 10-30 cm and at a constant speed. Make sure that the spray overlaps the previous spray slightly in order to achieve a uniform paint coverage. Which materials cannot be processed with an airless paint sprayer? Materials containing strong abrasive components. Masonry paint, alkalis and acidic coating materials. Combustible coating materials and materials containing acetone or nitro thinner.
